name: Protect K'un Lun
text:
You may flip to alter-ego form. Choose:
Exhaust Daniel Rand → remove Protect K'un Lun from the game.
Discard K'un Lun. If K'un Lun was not discarded this way, this card gains surge. Discard this obligation.

name: Forbidden Chamber
text: “Death of a father is life for the son.” Victory 0. When Revealed: Exhaust your identity. Place 1[per_hero] threat on each side scheme. [crisis]

name: Steel Serpent
text: You cannot attack other enemies while engaged with Steel Serpent. [star] Forced Interrupt: When Steel Serpent attacks, stun your identity. (Iron Fist's nemesis minion.)

name: Memory of the Dragon
text: Peril. When Revealed: Choose to either place 1[per_hero] threat on a scheme or exhaust 1 character you control.
